nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values:
[VISUAL]: The person speaks, their hands moving expressively with each phrase.

[SPEECH]: "They are already on their way."

[SOUNDS]: Alarming talking

A futuristic sidearm with an angular design. A handcrafted jury-rigged futuristic laser pistol laid horizontally on a seamless pale grey studio backdrop, shot in profile from the side. The compact weapon has a short hand-milled steel barrel wrapped loosely in thin copper wire, a single slim coolant tube threaded through the wooden grip and glowing a faint electric blue, a small scavenged phone battery taped into the rear housing, and a scratched brass charging tab. Crafted from thin metal plates, rusty and patched with exposed wires. Even, soft studio lighting from a large overhead softbox, no harsh shadows, subtle falloff toward the edges of the frame. Shot on an 85mm lens, razor sharp across the full length of the weapon, shallow depth of field falling off behind it. Neutral grey backdrop, product photography clarity. Use the drawing as rough layout.

nodes.title: Text Prompt
widgets_values: Wide shot: The person from the reference image stands alone at a wooden lecture podium in a modern university lecture hall. Their expression is desperate and impassioned, mouth open mid-word as if pleading to be believed. Behind them, a massive green chalkboard sprawls with dense orbital equations, scribbled star maps, and a hand-drawn sketch of a curved, insect-shelled alien vessel, with no lines and not arrows and not drawings near it. In the slightly out-of-focus foreground, the backs of dozens of students can be seen. Moody cinematic lighting. Match the facial features and style exactly. A still from a hollywood blockbuster.

nodes.title: Tip
widgets_values:
If you want to use voice reference, write your prompt in this structure:
[VISUAL]: <scene and appearance description>
[SPEECH]: <exact words the person should say>
[SOUNDS]: <speaker vocal style + ambient/environmental sounds>


Example:
[VISUAL]: A medium shot features a young man with curly brown hair and light blue eyes, sitting on a beige couch. He is wearing a light blue shirt and a red patterned tie. His mouth is slightly open as he speaks. In the background, there is a blurry room with warm lighting.
[SPEECH]: We are proud to introduce ID-LoRA.
[SOUNDS]: The speaker has a moderate volume and a conversational tone, sounding engaged and natural. They are close to the microphone. Light, instrumental background music plays softly, creating a calm atmosphere.

nodes.title: FLUX.2 Klein 4B
widgets_values:
## FLUX.2 Klein 4B Setup
This model is smaller and features a more permissive license. To use it, you must update both your diffusion model and text encoder.

---
You can download the models here:

FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8

[https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8/blob/main/flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8/blob/main/flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors)

📁 ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models

--

qwen_3_4b_fp4_flux2.safetensors

[https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-4b/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b_fp4_flux2.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/vae-text-encorder-for-flux-klein-4b/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b_fp4_flux2.safetensors)

📁 ComfyUI/models/text_encoders

--

[https://huggingface.co/nomadoor/flux-2-klein-4B-360-erp-outpaint-lora/blob/main/flux-2-klein-4B-360-erp-outpaint-lora_V1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/nomadoor/flux-2-klein-4B-360-erp-outpaint-lora/blob/main/flux-2-klein-4B-360-erp-outpaint-lora_V1.safetensors)

These RES4LYF nodes are only in this workflow to trigger missing custom nodes for RES4LYF.

text, subtitles, logo, still image, still video, no motion, static, frozen, blurry, low quality, distorted, bad anatomy, oversaturated, pixelated, low resolution, grainy, compression artifacts, jpeg artifacts, glitches, watermark, signature, copyright, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, blurry teeth, disfigured teeth, 
pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Extreme close up of the persons face, the person is looking determined with a hint of a smirk. Centered in the frame, the person is looking into the distance. In the blurred background the destroyed ruins and desert can be seen. Golden side light. Next to his face he is holding one futuristic blaster weapon made from old metal. The sun is on the left side of the image, creating a golden backlight on the subject. Strong Bokeh blurs the background completely with a shallow depth of field.
A creepy small alien monster crab walking in the sand. Golden hour sunset lighting casting long shadows. shallow depth of field.
A creepy small alien monster crab walking in the sand. Golden hour sunset lighting casting long shadows. shallow depth of field.
